§6Dusts & Materials§f:
The §6Dusts §f and §6Materials §fof AE2 are the §ebasic resources §f needed to craft processors, cores, and tools. They are produced from §6quartz processing §f or §6grindstone §f operations.

§6Dust and Material Family§f:
- §bCertus Quartz Dust §f(appliedenergistics2:material:2) — produced by grinding §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f or §6Certus Quartz Ore §f in a §6Macerator §f
- §bCharged Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:1) — produced by §6charging §f a Certus Quartz Crystal in a §6Charger §f
- §bNether Quartz Dust §f(appliedenergistics2:material:3) — produced by grinding §6Nether Quartz §f in a §6Macerator §f
- §bFluix Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:7) — produced by §6charging §f a §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f in water (or §6flipping §f a §6Quartz Grindstone §f)
- §bFluix Dust §f(appliedenergistics2:material:8) — produced by grinding §6Fluix Crystal §f in a §6Macerator §f
- §bPure Certus Quartz Crystal §f(appliedenergistics2:material:10) — produced by §6growing §f a §6Certus Quartz Bud §f in a §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f

§6Production Path (recipes/_constants.json:185-197)§f:
The §6appliedenergistics2:dustQuartz §foredict constant combines:
- §6dustCertusQuartz §f
- §6dustNetherQuartz §f

So §6Certus Quartz Dust §f, §6Nether Quartz Dust §f, and §6Fluix Dust §f are all in the same #appliedenergistics2:dustQuartz tag.

The §6Certus Quartz Dust §fdirect recipe comes from any §6Macerator §f recipe in the modpack (typically §6Macerator §f of §6Certus Quartz Crystal §f or §6Certus Quartz Ore §f).

§6Function§f:
- §bCertus Quartz Dust §f: ingredient in §6Tiny TNT §f and §6Quartz Glass §f recipes
- §bNether Quartz Dust §f: same uses as Certus Quartz Dust
- §bFluix Dust §f: ingredient in §6Spatial Pylon §f, §6Spatial IO Port §f, and §6Matter Condenser §f recipes
- §bPure Certus Quartz Crystal §f: ingredient in §6Formation Core §f and §6P2P Tunnel §f recipes

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 3 items the Certus Quartz Dust is a component of:
- §6Tiny TNT §f
- §6Quartz Glass §f
- §6Charged Certus Quartz Dust §f (if it exists in the modpack)

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: set up a §6Macerator §f farm with §6Certus Quartz Ore §f and §6Nether Quartz Ore §f to produce dusts in bulk
- §eTip§f: §6Fluix Crystal §f is best produced in a §6Quartz Grindstone §f; see §6Fluix Crystal §f quest
- §eTip§f: a §6Crystal Growth Accelerator §f is the §6only §f way to produce §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f in the early game
- §cWarning§f: §6Certus Quartz Dust §f is §6not §f usable in the same recipes as §6Nether Quartz Dust §f for some §6modded §f recipes
- §cWarning§f: §6Pure Certus Quartz Crystal §f cannot be §6crafted §f from §bregular §fCertus Quartz Crystal — it must be §bgrown §f
